requirement_topic.en: Market Access and Importer Obligations: Philippine BPS PS or ICC, DTI Registration, and Labelling Versus China Domestic Placement
requirement_topic.zh: 市场准入与进口商义务：菲律宾BPS PS或ICC、DTI注册及标签对比中国境内投放
requirement_topic.zht: 市場准入與進口商義務：菲律賓BPS PS或ICC、DTI註冊及標籤對比中國境內投放

summary.en: Placing a regulated power tool on the Philippine market normally requires an in-country importer or licensee, a BPS PS licence for local manufacture or an Import Commodity Clearance for each importation where the product is under a technical regulation, and compliance with DTI consumer labelling rules. Clearance is processed through BPS and customs at ports such as Manila MICT, South Harbor, and Subic, and the importer is the accountable party for product conformity, marking, and recordkeeping. Where energy-using appliances are involved, DOE energy labelling may also apply, though most hand power tools fall under the BPS safety route rather than appliance MEPS.
summary.zh: 在菲律宾市场投放受管电动工具通常需要在地进口商或持证人、本地制造的BPS PS许可或在产品属技术法规时每批进口的进口商品清关（ICC），并符合DTI消费品标签规则。清关经由BPS及马尼拉MICT、南港、苏比克等口岸海关办理，进口商为产品合规、标识及记录保存的责任方。涉及耗能电器时还可能适用DOE能源标签，但多数手持电动工具走BPS安全路线而非电器MEPS。
summary.zht: 在菲律賓市場投放受管電動工具通常需要在地進口商或持證人、本地製造的BPS PS許可或在產品屬技術法規時每批進口的進口商品清關（ICC），並符合DTI消費品標籤規則。清關經由BPS及馬尼拉MICT、南港、蘇比克等口岸海關辦理，進口商為產品合規、標識及記錄保存的責任方。涉及耗能電器時還可能適用DOE能源標籤，但多數手持電動工具走BPS安全路線而非電器MEPS。

standards_or_laws: BPS PS Quality or Safety Certification Mark (local manufacture) or Import Commodity Clearance (ICC) under DTI
DTI consumer product labelling and the Consumer Act of the Philippines (Republic Act 7394)
In-country importer or licensee; customs clearance at Manila MICT, South Harbor, or Subic
DOE energy labelling and MEPS where an energy-using appliance is in scope

summary.en: For the China domestic market a manufacturer places the tool under CCC where catalogue-listed, applies GB and GB/T conformity, and follows Chinese labelling in Chinese. There is no Philippine importer, PS or ICC, or DTI labelling obligation built into a China-market product, so the market-access layer is entirely separate from the engineering standards layer.
summary.zh: 面向中国境内市场，制造商对目录内产品按CCC投放，适用GB和GB/T合格评定，并遵循中文标签。面向中国市场的产品本身不含菲律宾进口商、PS或ICC或DTI标签义务，故市场准入层与工程标准层完全分离。
summary.zht: 面向中國境內市場，製造商對目錄內產品按CCC投放，適用GB和GB/T合格評定，並遵循中文標籤。面向中國市場的產品本身不含菲律賓進口商、PS或ICC或DTI標籤義務，故市場准入層與工程標準層完全分離。

gap.en: The exporter should appoint or confirm a Philippine importer, determine whether the tool needs a PS licence or per-shipment ICC, and prepare DTI-compliant labelling including importer name and address, country of origin, and required safety markings. Treating Philippine market access as a paperwork step distinct from the IEC 62841 test report avoids shipments being held at the port for missing ICC or labelling.
gap.zh: 出口商应委任或确认菲律宾进口商，判定工具需要PS许可还是每批ICC，并准备符合DTI的标签，包括进口商名称地址、原产国及所需安全标识。将菲律宾市场准入视为与IEC 62841检测报告不同的文书步骤，可避免因缺少ICC或标签而货物滞港。
gap.zht: 出口商應委任或確認菲律賓進口商，判定工具需要PS許可還是每批ICC，並準備符合DTI的標籤，包括進口商名稱地址、原產國及所需安全標識。將菲律賓市場准入視為與IEC 62841檢測報告不同的文書步驟，可避免因缺少ICC或標籤而貨物滯港。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the tool is under a Philippine technical regulation: PS for local manufacture or ICC per importation, plus DTI labelling and an in-country importer; energy labelling mandatory only for in-scope energy-using appliances
mandatory_status.cn: CCC mandatory for catalogue-listed products; Chinese labelling mandatory for domestic sale

source.publisher: Bureau of Philippine Standards, Department of Trade and Industry (Philippines)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Philippine market access for a power tool is a distinct layer from the safety standard: the exporter should confirm BPS PS or ICC scope, an accountable in-country importer, customs clearance, and DTI-compliant labelling before relying on engineering conformity alone.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 电动工具的菲律宾市场准入是与安全标准不同的层面：出口商在仅依赖工程合规前，应确认BPS PS或ICC范围、负责任的在地进口商、海关清关及符合DTI的标签。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 電動工具的菲律賓市場准入是與安全標準不同的層面：出口商在僅依賴工程合規前，應確認BPS PS或ICC範圍、負責任的在地進口商、海關清關及符合DTI的標籤。
